title: kobresia simpliciuscula subsp. subfilifolia
intro: Kobresia simpliciuscula subsp. subfilifolia is a type of sedges, a genus of grass-like plants in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Kobresia simpliciuscula subsp. subfilifolia include its ability to reduce swelling and ease respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
